case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DAWN COONS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COONS, DAWN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED DEC-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COONS, DAWN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT COONS, DAWN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COONS, DAWN $2,981.16 PRINCIPAL, $147.06 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,374.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COONS, DAWN DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-28-2013
